description: UI-side worker demo state and patch-apply function

v.code: const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'ui_mgmt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object' || inbox.version !== 'v0') return; const patch = inbox.payload; if (!patch || patch.version !== 'mt.v0' || !Array.isArray(patch.records)) return; const records = patch.records.filter((record) => record && (record.op === 'add_label' || record.op === 'rm_label') && record.model_id === 1); if (records.length > 0) { ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'ui_side_owner_req_1' }, 'pin.table.out', { op: 'apply_records', target_model_id: 1, request_id: patch.op_id || 'ui_side_snapshot_delta', ts: Date.now(), records }); } ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'ui_mgmt_inbox' });
